entity.label: Elhanan
entity.subtitle: Male
entity.description: The son of Dodo, and one of David’s warriors (2 Sam. 23:24).

nodes.label: Elhanan
nodes.description: The son of Dodo, and one of David’s warriors (2 Sam. 23:24).

nodes.label: Dodo
nodes.description: A Bethlehemite, and father of Elhanan, who was one of David’s thirty heroes (2 Sam. 23:24).

verses.text: Asahel the brother of Joab was one of the thirty; Elhanan the son of Dodo of Bethlehem,
Also the valiant men of the armies were, Asahel the brother of Joab, Elhanan the son of Dodo of Bethlehem,
